description: GroceryResource using unevaluatedProperties: false (JSON Schema 2020-12). Extends an open RetailResource. unevaluatedProperties sees ALL properties evaluated by any allOf entry, so 'nutrition' and 'freshProduce' are accepted. CAVEAT: further extension via allOf (e.g. adding 'organic') is still blocked because this schema's unevaluatedProperties: false will reject the new field.
